headline: Open Source, After Mythos
summary: There is a pattern we keep seeing in technology. When software moves from product to platform and then from platform to infrastructure, the rules change.

raw.headline: Open Source, After Mythos

headline: IBM’s SAIL Move Reframes AI Patent Sharing And Long Term Moat
summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) and several major tech companies have formed the Shared AI License Foundation (SAIL) to create a collaborative patent network for AI foundation models. The initiative is designed to provide shared, non exclusive patent access to participating members to support AI model development. Through SAIL, IBM is taking a broad role in shaping how key AI technologies are shared and deployed across the industry. For you as an investor, SAIL adds another layer to IBM's AI activity,...

headline: Amazon debuts Masters coverage, becoming the tournament's fourth-ever media partner
summary: Amazon will have two hours of exclusive Masters coverage Thursday and Friday in its debut year as a media partner for the prestigious golf tournament.

headline: Teradyne (TER) Soars to All-Time High — Time to Book Profits?
summary: Teradyne Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) is one of the 10 Stocks That Would Have Boosted Your Portfolios by Double Digits. Teradyne surged to a fresh all-time high on Wednesday, as optimistic sentiment over Intel Corp.’s involvement in Elon Musk’s Terafab project spilled over into its stock. In intra-day trading, Teradyne Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) climbed to its highest price […]
